_comment: Workshop Video 02 — The System (split version, scenes 1-3 of original 6). Master Log + Recover + Shipped Slash Commands. Single-stem rendering. JSONL spelt JSON-L in scene 2 so ElevenLabs reads it 'jay-son-L'. House voice preset.

scenes.text: The Master Log lives at the project level — these are your breadcrumbs. When you sit back down to work, you don't want to get buried in files. Open the log, get a quick read of where you are, and Claude picks up the context you've already captured.

Claude crashes. You're out of context. No problem — you don't paste anything. You ask. Claude, review the JSON-L file for this project and pick up where we left off. It reads the session and you're back.
Slash commands are your shortcuts inside Claude Code — and plenty ship out of the box. Slash-new. Slash-resume. Slash-clear. Slash-mcp-status. Slash-models. Five strokes saves you a sentence.
